title: Innovative IPM technologies: towards a sustainable and environmental-friendly future
subtitle: Καινοτόμες τεχνολογίες IPM: προς ένα μέλλον βιώσιμο και φιλικό προς το περιβάλλον
description: A practice abstract for the SmartProtect thematic network presenting innovative smart integrated pest management solutions for vegetable production, focusing on enhancing prevention, detection, and targeted treatment to reduce chemical use. It highlights novel monitoring, sensing, predictive modelling, and decision support technologies that improve efficiency, minimize impacts on non-target organisms, and support sustainable, environmentally friendly farming.
